message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
abstract class Iterable {
    +__iter__
}

abstract class Sized {
    +__len__
}

abstract class Container {
    +__contains__
}

abstract class Collection {
    +__contains__
    +__iter__
    +__len__
}

abstract class Reversible {
    +__reversed__
}

abstract class Sequence {
    +__getitem__
    +__len__
    +__contains__
    +__iter__
    +__reversed__
    +index
    +count
}

abstract class MutableSequence {
    +__getitem__
    +__setitem__
    +__delitem__
    +__len__
    +insert
    +__contains__
    +__iter__
    +__reversed__
    +index
    +count
    +append
    +reverse
    +extend
    +pop
    +remove
    +__iadd__
}

Collection --|> Iterable
Collection --|> Sized
Collection --|> Container
Reversible --|> Iterable
Sequence --|> Collection
Sequence --|> Reversible
MutableSequence --|> Sequence

@enduml
```
